name: Slack
description: Send messages, search conversations, manage channels, and access Slack workspace data through AI chat.
user_auth_instructions:
Click 'Connect' to link your Slack account.
You'll be prompted to select your Slack workspace and grant permissions.
setup_notes:
Uses Slack's official MCP server.

Admin setup:
1. Create a Slack App at https://api.slack.com/apps
2. Under OAuth & Permissions, add required Bot Token Scopes:
   - channels:read, channels:history, chat:write
   - search:read, users:read
3. Install the app to your workspace
4. The MCP server uses OAuth 2.0 for per-user authentication

Transport: Streamable HTTP (JSON-RPC 2.0)
SSE and Dynamic Client Registration are not supported.
